content.hint: 回应感谢时，先表示不客气，再加入祝福和未来再见的表达更自然。

blanks.answer: Take care and let's do this again soon!
options: Take care and let's do this again soon!

content.situation: 朋友在聚会结束时对你说：'This was such a wonderful evening, I really appreciate you hosting us.' 你需要礼貌回应并表达祝福。
content.speakerText: This was such a wonderful evening, I really appreciate you hosting us.
content.speakerTextCn: 今晚太棒了，非常感谢你招待我们。
content.knowledgePoint: 礼貌告别中的感谢回应与祝福表达

content.hint: 告别时对开车的人常用的祝福语
content.template: I really had a great time—thanks again! Me too! ___ safe and talk soon!
content.knowledgePoint: 固定表达：Drive safe（口语中常用，非正式但自然）
